components.name: Anchor
components.description: Invisible anchor element for in-page navigation. Renders a div with a given ID for scroll targeting.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier used as the anchor target

components.name: AnimateBlock
components.description: Wrapper component that triggers CSS animations when the element scrolls into the viewport using react-waypoint.

props.name: animate
props.description: Whether to enable scroll-triggered animation. Defaults to the AnimateContext value.

props.name: offset
props.description: Bottom offset in pixels for the waypoint trigger

props.name: onScroll
props.description: Callback triggered when element enters viewport

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the animated block

components.name: Author
components.description: Displays author information with avatar, name, and optional description. Supports column and row layout types.

props.name: author
props.type: { firstName: string; secondName?: string; description?: string; avatar?: ImageProps | React.ReactElement }
props.description: Author data including name, description, and avatar

props.name: authorContainerClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the avatar container

components.name: BackLink
components.description: Navigation button with a left arrow icon for back navigation. Supports browser history-based back action.

props.name: url
props.description: Target URL for the back link

props.name: title
props.description: Text or content to display in the button

props.name: shouldHandleBackAction
props.description: Whether to use browser history for back navigation instead of direct link

components.name: BackgroundImage
components.description: Container component that renders a background image with optional children overlaid on top.

props.name: imageClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the image element

props.name: children
props.description: Content to overlay on the background image

components.name: BackgroundMedia
components.description: Background media component that renders animated image or video backgrounds with parallax support.

props.name: mediaClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the media element

props.name: fullWidthMedia
props.description: Whether media should span full width

props.name: image
props.description: Image or array of images (inherited from MediaProps)

props.name: youtube
props.description: YouTube video ID or URL (inherited from MediaProps)

props.name: videoIframe
props.description: Custom video iframe URL (inherited from MediaProps)

props.name: height
props.description: Media height in pixels (inherited from MediaProps)

props.name: previewImg
props.description: Preview image URL for video (inherited from MediaProps)

components.name: BalancedMasonry
components.description: Responsive masonry layout that distributes children across columns balanced by height. Recalculates on resize.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name for the container

props.name: columnClassName
props.description: CSS class name for each column

props.name: children
props.description: Array of child elements to distribute across columns

props.name: breakpointCols
props.description: Mapping of viewport widths to number of columns

components.name: BlockBase
components.description: Base wrapper for page constructor blocks. Provides anchor support, indent control, and visibility settings.

components.name: BrandFooter
components.description: Footer component displaying the Gravity UI brand with a link to gravity-ui.com. Adapts icon to current theme.

components.name: Button
components.description: Versatile button component supporting multiple themes, icons, images, store badges, and analytics events.

props.name: img
props.type: string | { url?: string; iconData?: IconData | string; iconSize?: number; className?: string; position?: 'left' | 'right'; alt?: string }

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on click

components.name: ButtonTabs
components.description: Tabbed navigation using button-styled tabs with ARIA tablist/tab roles.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of tab items with id and title

props.name: activeTab
props.description: ID of the currently active tab

props.name: onSelectTab
props.type: (tabId: string | null, e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement | HTMLAnchorElement>) => void
props.description: Callback when a tab is selected

props.name: getTabElementId
props.description: Function to generate tab element IDs for accessibility

props.name: getTabContentElementId
props.description: Function to generate tab content element IDs for aria-controls

components.name: Buttons
components.description: Container component that renders a list of Button components with consistent sizing.

props.name: titleId
props.description: ID of associated title element for aria-describedby

props.name: buttonQa
props.description: QA attribute passed to individual buttons

components.name: CardBase
components.description: Composable card layout with Header, Content, and Footer compound components. Supports links, borders, and background images.

props.name: bodyClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the card body

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the content area

props.name: url
props.description: URL to make the card a link

props.name: urlTitle
props.description: Title attribute for the card link

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on click

props.name: children
props.description: CardBase.Header, CardBase.Content, and CardBase.Footer compound components

components.name: ContentList
components.description: Renders a list of content items each with an optional icon, title, and text. Supports themed and sized variants.

props.name: list
props.type: Array<{ icon?: ThemeSupporting<ImageProps | SVGIcon>; title?: string; text?: string; gravityIcon?: ThemeSupporting<GravityIconProps> }>
props.description: Array of list items with icon, title, and text

props.name: size
props.description: Size variant affecting heading level and styling

components.name: Control
components.description: Icon button component for toolbar-style controls with theme, size, and disabled state support.

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Size of the icon in pixels

components.name: ErrorWrapper
components.description: Conditional error display wrapper. Shows error message with retry button when isError is true, otherwise renders children.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render when not in error state

components.name: FileLink
components.description: File download link component with file type label. Auto-detects file extension and applies themed label colors.

components.name: Foldable
components.description: Collapsible container that animates height between 0 and content height. Uses useHeightCalculator for dynamic sizing.

components.name: FullWidthBackground
components.description: Class component that stretches its background to full viewport width regardless of parent container constraints.

components.name: FullscreenImage
components.description: Image component that opens in a fullscreen modal on click. Supports image sliders in the modal view.

props.name: imageClassName
props.description: CSS class for the inline image

props.name: modalImageClass
props.description: CSS class for the modal image

props.name: extraProps
props.description: Additional HTML attributes for the container

components.name: FullscreenMedia
components.description: Wrapper that adds fullscreen modal capability to media content. Uses render props pattern for children. Disabled on mobile.

props.name: showFullscreenIcon
props.description: Whether to show the fullscreen expand icon

props.name: children
props.description: Render function that receives media props for inline and fullscreen modes

components.name: HTML
components.description: Renders raw HTML content via dangerouslySetInnerHTML with configurable tag name and content positioning.

props.name: block
props.description: Whether to render as block-level element

props.name: tagName
props.description: HTML tag to use for rendering

props.name: contentPosition
props.description: Position of HTML content relative to children

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the content element

props.name: onlyContent
props.description: Whether to render only the content without wrapper

props.name: children
props.description: Additional children to render alongside HTML content

components.name: HeaderBreadcrumbs
components.description: Breadcrumb navigation component for page headers with analytics event support.

props.name: items
props.description: Breadcrumb items with URL and display text

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on breadcrumb click

components.name: IconWrapper
components.description: Wraps children with an icon positioned to the left or right. Renders icon using the Icon component.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to wrap with the icon

components.name: Image
components.description: Responsive image component with device-specific sources, WebP optimization, and configurable compression settings.

props.name: fetchPriority
props.description: Fetch priority hint for the browser

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the picture container

components.name: ImageBase
components.description: Low-level image component that renders via a custom Image context or falls back to a native img tag. Supports fetchPriority.

components.name: InnerForm
components.description: Form renderer that switches between Yandex Forms and HubSpot Forms based on the provided form data configuration.

props.name: onContentLoad
props.description: Callback when form content has loaded

components.name: Link
components.description: Multipurpose link component supporting normal, back, file-link, and underline themes with size and color variants.

props.name: arrow
props.description: Whether to show a right arrow icon

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on click

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to render instead of text

components.name: Links
components.description: Container component for rendering a list of Link components with consistent sizing.

props.name: titleId
props.description: ID of associated title for aria-describedby

props.name: linkQa
props.description: QA attribute passed to individual links

components.name: Map
components.description: Map component that renders Yandex or Google Maps based on the MapsContext configuration.

components.name: Media
components.description: Versatile media component supporting images, videos, YouTube embeds, DataLens charts, and iframes with fullscreen support.

props.name: disableImageSliderForArrayInput
props.description: Disable slider behavior when image is an array

props.name: isBackground
props.description: Whether the media is used as a background

props.name: customBarControlsClassName
props.description: CSS class for custom bar controls

props.name: margins
props.description: Whether to apply margins to iframe

props.name: videoMicrodata
props.type: { name?: string; description?: string; duration?: string; uploadDate?: string; contentUrl?: string; thumbnailUrl?: string }
props.description: Structured data for video SEO (VideoObject schema)

props.name: isFullscreenImageCover
props.description: Whether fullscreen image uses cover mode

components.name: MetaInfo
components.description: Renders a list of meta information items using YFM markup.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of meta info text strings

components.name: OutsideClick
components.description: Class component that detects clicks outside its boundaries and triggers a callback.

props.name: onOutsideClick
props.description: Callback triggered when clicking outside the component

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for the component itself

components.name: OverflowScroller
components.description: Class component providing horizontal scrolling with arrow navigation for overflowing content.

props.name: arrowClassName
props.description: CSS class for the arrow buttons

components.name: ReactPlayer
components.description: Feature-rich video player based on react-player with custom controls, mute/play buttons, progress tracking, and analytics.

props.name: previewImgUrl
props.description: Preview image URL shown before play

props.name: controls
props.description: Controls type: default browser or custom

props.name: autoplay
props.description: Whether to autoplay (disabled on mobile and with preview)

props.name: customBarControlsClassName
props.description: CSS class for custom bar controls

props.name: contain
props.description: Whether to contain the video within bounds

props.name: elapsedTime
props.description: Time in seconds to start playback from

props.name: customControlsOptions
props.description: Configuration for custom controls (type, muteButtonShown, positioning)

components.name: RouterLink
components.description: Wrapper component that uses a custom Link component from LocationContext for client-side navigation, or renders children directly.

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table class component with legend support, marker types (disk, tick), and YFM-formatted cell content.

components.name: Title
components.description: Section title component with optional subtitle, column sizing, and justification. Renders title via TitleItem sub-component.

props.name: title
props.description: Title text or full title configuration

components.name: ToggleArrow
components.description: Animated arrow icon used for toggle/expand indicators. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the arrow shows open/expanded state

props.name: thin
props.description: Whether to use thin arrow style

components.name: UnpublishedLabel
components.description: Visual label indicating unpublished content. Supports label and line display types.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom label content (defaults to i18n unpublished text)

components.name: VideoBlock
components.description: YouTube/iframe video embed component with preview image, play button, autoplay support, and responsive height.

props.name: stream
props.description: YouTube live stream URL or channel ID

props.name: height
props.description: Fixed height (auto-calculated from 16:9 ratio if not set)

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on preview click

components.name: YFMWrapper
components.description: Wrapper for rendering Yandex Flavored Markdown (YFM) content via the HTML component with YFM CSS class modifiers.

props.name: modifiers
props.description: CSS BEM modifiers for the YFM wrapper

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS class for the content element

components.name: YandexForm
components.description: Embeds a Yandex Form via dynamically created iframe with theme support, analytics, and message-based communication.

props.name: headerHeight
props.description: Header height offset for scroll positioning

props.name: analyticsEvents
props.description: Analytics events to fire on form submit

hooks.name: useAnalytics
hooks.signature: (name?: string, target?: string) => (e?: AnalyticsEventsProp | null, additionalContext?: Record<string, string>) => void
hooks.return_type: (e?: AnalyticsEventsProp | null, additionalContext?: Record<string, string>) => void
hooks.description: Returns a function to send analytics events. Uses AnalyticsContext for event dispatch and BlockIdContext for context.

hooks.name: useDeviceValue

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Device-specific value map or a plain value

hooks.description: Returns the appropriate value for the current device (desktop, tablet, or mobile) based on window width and breakpoints.

hooks.name: useFocus
hooks.signature: (element?: HTMLElement) => { hasFocus: boolean; setFocus: () => void; unsetFocus: () => void }

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: DOM element to track focus on

hooks.return_type: { hasFocus: boolean; setFocus: () => void; unsetFocus: () => void }
hooks.description: Tracks focus state on a DOM element. Uses mouseenter/mouseleave on desktop and pointerdown on mobile.

hooks.name: useHeightCalculator
hooks.signature: (containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>, options?: { recalculateOnResizeDelay: number }) => number | undefined

parameters.name: containerRef
parameters.description: Ref to the container element to measure

hooks.description: Calculates and tracks the height of a container element, recalculating on window resize with debouncing.

hooks.name: useMount

parameters.name: handler
parameters.description: Effect handler called on mount, may return cleanup function

hooks.description: Runs a handler function once on component mount. Wrapper around useEffect with empty dependency array.

hooks.name: useWindowBreakpoint
hooks.description: Returns the current active breakpoint value based on window width. Updates on window resize with debouncing.

hooks.name: useLoopBackHubspotEvents

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Hubspot form ID to listen for and loop back events

hooks.description: Attaches a window message listener on the top-level frame that loops back Hubspot form events back to the origin frame. Must be used in the top-level frame.

hooks.name: useHandleHubspotEvents

parameters.name: handlers
parameters.description: Form event handlers object; should be stable across renders (memoized)

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Hubspot form ID to handle events for

hooks.description: Attaches a window message listener in any frame to handle Hubspot form events using the provided handlers. Handlers must be stable across renders to avoid re-subscribing.
